title: Election Basics
description: Test your knowledge on the fundamental rules of Indian elections.

questions.question: What is the minimum age to register as a voter in India?
questions.explanation: Citizens who are 18 years of age or above on the qualifying date are eligible to register as voters.

questions.question: Which form is used for new voter registration?
questions.explanation: Form 6 is specifically for the registration of new voters.

questions.question: What does EPIC stand for in the context of Voter IDs?
questions.explanation: EPIC stands for Electoral Photo Identity Card.

title: Voting Process
description: How well do you know what happens on polling day?

questions.question: How long does a VVPAT slip remain visible for the voter?
questions.explanation: The VVPAT slip stays visible through the glass window for 7 seconds before falling into the box.

questions.question: What happens immediately after your identity is verified at the polling booth?
options: Your finger is marked with indelible ink
questions.explanation: After identity verification, the second polling officer marks your left forefinger with indelible ink.
